# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: clone
  GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY: recursive
  CI_REGISTRY: $CI_REGISTRY
  CI_REGISTRY_USER: $CI_REGISTRY_USER
  CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD: $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD

before_script:
  - 'which ssh-agent || ( apt-get update -y && apt-get install openssh-client -y )'
  - eval $(ssh-agent -s)
  - ssh-add <(echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY")
  - git config --global url."https://gitlab-ci-token:$CI_JOB_TOKEN@${CI_SERVER_HOST}/${CI_PROJECT_PATH}.git".insteadOf "https://${CI_SERVER_HOST}/${CI_PROJECT_PATH}.git"

build:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - chmod +x ./scripts/build.sh
    - ./scripts/build.sh
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/
    expire_in: 1 week
  only:
    - main
    - develop
    - merge_requests
  tags:
    - shared

test:
  stage: test
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - chmod +x ./scripts/test.sh
    - ./scripts/test.sh
  only:
    - main
    - develop
    - merge_requests
  tags:
    - shared

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - chmod +x ./scripts/deploy.sh
    - ./scripts/deploy.sh
  only:
    - main
  tags:
    - shared
  environment:
    name: production
    url: $PRODUCTION_URL

security:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - chmod +x ./scripts/security-check.sh
    - ./scripts/security-check.sh
  only:
    - main
    - develop
  tags:
    - shared

cache:
  key: "$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG"
  paths:
    - .cache/
    - node_modules/
    - vendor/

workflow:
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "develop"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_TAG
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "schedule"

include:
  - local: .gitlab/ci/custom-builds.yml
  - local: .gitlab/ci/security.yml
